lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical defects and no cosmetic damage. The exterior and interior are in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been used regularly. While it is mechanically operational and currently runs, a prospective buyer should be prepared for some upcoming maintenance tasks. Specifically, the brakes are nearing the end of their lifespan and the tires show significant wear, likely needing replacement soon. Cosmetically, there are visible scratches and some minor dings on the exterior panels, and the interior upholstery shows noticeable staining and wear from years of use. It’s a reliable workhorse for someone willing to put in a little effort to bring it back to its best.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant investment or mechanical expertise to return to reliable operation. The exterior shows its age with extensive paint fading, several notable dents, and areas of surface rust. Inside, the interior has seen heavy use, with significant tears in the seating and a headliner that needs repair. Mechanically, the car starts but runs roughly, and there is a persistent leak in the cooling system. Most power features, including the windows and air conditioning, are currently non-functional. It is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project.

Attention project lovers and DIY fans! This vehicle is the perfect canvas for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a car back to its former glory. While it currently requires significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it offers a fantastic opportunity to own a vehicle at a very accessible price point. If you're looking for a rewarding challenge and a way to build some sweat equity, this is the one for you!

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability. Every mechanical component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our dealership's rigorous standards. With its refined interior and commanding road presence, this automobile provides an exceptional driving experience that exceeds the expectations of its class. We invite you to experience the caliber of this machine firsthand.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-taken care of over the years. Perfect for someone who wants a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It runs super smooth and is totally ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin—I know you'll love it as much as I have!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a documented rear subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment to ensure optimal timing and compression. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and staggered Style 67 wheels, this driver-focused example offers a mechanical purity rare in modern grand tourers. Minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, but mechanically robust and ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

Presenting a well-cared-for 2018 BMW 440i Gran Coupe in Mineral Grey Metallic. This vehicle offers a perfect blend of sportiness and everyday utility. The exterior is in great shape, showcasing a sleek silhouette with only minor road wear visible upon close inspection. Inside, the Dakota leather seats are supple and clean, complemented by a suite of premium features including a power sunroof, Harman Kardon premium audio, and an intuitive navigation system. Under the hood, the turbocharged inline-six engine runs flawlessly

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive professional inspection, the vehicle exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership, offering a refined driving experience and a sophisticated presence on the road. We are pleased to offer this high-caliber selection to our inventory.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and enduring value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic condition, ensuring a sophisticated and reliable driving experience. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber vehicle with a documented history of care and integrity.

Hey there! I'm selling my reliable ride that's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It runs like a charm and looks great too! I've taken good care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offered is a mechanically sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six, a masterpiece of engineering with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This unit delivers a linear power band peaking at an 8,000 RPM redline, paired with a tactile Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission. The chassis integrity has been preserved with essential subframe reinforcement already completed, and the suspension geometry remains precise thanks to refreshed bushings and dampers. The factory limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the drivetrain is robust, benefiting from consistent valve adjustments and rod bearing surveillance. It is a driver-focused example that prioritizes mechanical excellence and analog feedback.
Good condition. Reliable performance. Clean interior and exterior. Regular maintenance performed. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and refined performance. Meticulously maintained throughout its life, the exterior still boasts a deep, impressive gloss, showing only minor signs of road use consistent with its age. Step inside to find a pristine, smoke-free interior where the premium upholstery remains supple and free of any significant wear. All onboard electronics, including the navigation and climate control systems, function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, reflecting a consistent service history. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, a comprehensive multi-point inspection, and tires that still have the vast majority of their tread life remaining. The transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a composed, comfortable ride on both city streets and highways. This is a solid, well-cared-for car that is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence. Service records are available for your review.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent maintenance and careful stewardship. The exterior retains its refined character, while the mechanical systems have been rigorously vetted to ensure sustained performance and reliability. This unit represents an optimal balance of value and prestige, providing a composed driving experience for the discerning professional. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that exemplifies enduring quality and mechanical integrity.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. With a documented service history and a clean interior, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional long-term value.

Hi there! I’m looking for a new home for my favorite set of wheels! 🚗 It’s been such a reliable ride and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for your next road trip or just cruising around town. It runs like a dream and has been super well-loved. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make its next owner very happy! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Presenting an E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This driver-focused example has received critical preventative maintenance, including a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul. The chassis remains taut with upgraded poly-bushings and a limited-slip differential that ensures optimal torque distribution. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering the signature linear power delivery and telepathic steering response this chassis is renowned for.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Maintenance records available.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers a perfect blend of performance and sophisticated style. The exterior is finished in a timeless Obsidian Black that retains a deep luster, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin featuring supple charcoal leather upholstery, genuine wood accents, and a premium surround-sound system. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the heated power seats, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the vehicle is robust; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, with a comprehensive log of maintenance records included. Recent updates include a fresh set of all-season tires and a new battery. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been treated with the utmost respect by its previous owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Exhibiting a refined aesthetic and robust mechanical integrity, this specimen offers a superior balance of performance and reliability. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. A premier selection for those who demand excellence and consistent value in their automotive investments.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent performance and remains in commendable condition for the discerning owner. This offering represents a premier opportunity to acquire a reliable, high-caliber automobile at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! I’m so excited to find a new home for my awesome car! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in wonderful shape, running like a dream. It’s super clean, comfy, and ready for many more adventures. You’re going to love how it handles! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 power plant. This naturally aspirated unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a GKN-sourced M Variable Differential Lock for superior lateral dynamics. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The chassis remains taut with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) offering adjustable damping rates. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with a well-loved driver's car, the drivetrain remains robust, benefiting from consistent fluid analysis and a rigorous service schedule.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date. Minimal cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday reliability. Finished in a deep metallic gloss that still catches the light beautifully, the exterior shows only the minor, honest signs of careful road use expected for its age. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule; we recently performed a full fluid flush and a comprehensive brake inspection to ensure it is ready for its next journey. Inside, the cabin remains a serene environment, with the premium upholstery showing gentle character but no tears, and all electronic features—from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functioning exactly as they should. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. This car has been a dependable companion and is in solid, road-ready shape for anyone looking for high quality and consistent performance

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies both performance and reliability. This specimen has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a refined driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking high-caliber value.
